name: claude-stt
description: Local speech-to-text plugin for Claude Code using Moonshine ONNX model for on-device audio processing. Push-to-talk via Ctrl+Shift+Space hotkey with ~400ms transcription latency. All audio processed locally with no external service calls.
scan_summary: Python plugin with SessionStart hook that starts background STT daemon. Uses exec.py launcher and setup.py bootstrapper. Moonshine ONNX model downloaded on setup. All audio processing is local. Background daemon model warrants review of daemon lifecycle management.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
